description:
Create a powerful investment platform website 'Global Investment Map' with the following structure:

**HOMEPAGE (/):**
- Epic hero section with animated globe/earth visualization in the background (use CSS animations or Three.js-like effects)
- Large headline: 'GLOBAL INVESTMENT MAP' with subtitle 'Первая в мире визуальная инвестиционная экосистема'
- Three main value propositions with icons: 'Ищу инвестиции' (for startups), 'Ищу проекты' (for investors), 'Деловое сотрудничество' (B2B partnerships)
- Key metrics section: $402M выручка, 150,000 проектов, 350,000 инвесторов, 32+ стран
- Features section showcasing: AI-powered search (NOVA), Video presentations, Blockchain tokenization, Real-time communication
- Problem/Solution section explaining market fragmentation and how GIM solves it
- Business model overview (7 revenue streams)
- Call-to-action buttons: 'Открыть карту инвестиций' and 'Разместить проект'
- Modern dark theme with blue/purple gradients, glassmorphism effects
- Smooth scroll animations

**MAP PAGE (/map):**
- Full-screen Google Maps integration using Leaflet.js with OpenStreetMap tiles
- Toggle buttons for switching between satellite view and standard map view (styled like Google Maps toggle)
- Investment objects displayed as markers with color coding by category:
  - Green: Renewable Energy (солнечные фермы, ветряные станции)
  - Blue: Technology/Startups
  - Orange: Real Estate
  - Purple: F&B/Restaurant
  - Red: Healthcare
- Sample investment objects with real UK locations:
  1. Solar Farm Yorkshire - £500K, 14% ROI - coordinates near Leeds
  2. Tech Startup London - £250K, Seed stage - coordinates in London
  3. Restaurant Manchester - £150K, profitable - coordinates in Manchester
  4. Med-Tech Cambridge - £1.2M, Series A - coordinates in Cambridge
  5. Wind Farm Scotland - £2M, 12% ROI - coordinates in Edinburgh area
  6. PropTech Birmingham - £400K, Pre-seed - coordinates in Birmingham
  7. FinTech Bristol - £800K, Series A - coordinates in Bristol
  8. BioTech Oxford - £3M, Series B - coordinates in Oxford
- Clicking on marker shows popup card with: project name, investment amount, ROI/stage, category, brief description, 'Подробнее' button
- Left sidebar with smart filters: by investment amount (slider), by category (checkboxes), by stage (dropdown), by ROI range
- Search bar with autocomplete
- Cluster markers when zoomed out
- Floating AI assistant button (NOVA) in corner
- Header with logo and navigation back to homepage

**DESIGN REQUIREMENTS:**
- Use modern glassmorphism cards
- Dark theme (#0a0a1a, #1a1a2e) with accent colors (#00d4ff, #7c3aed, #10b981)
- Smooth animations and transitions
- Responsive design
- Professional and futuristic look suitable for investors
- Russian language for UI text

Enhance the website with following improvements:

1. **Homepage enhancements:**
- Add a testimonials/social proof section with investor quotes
- Add animated counter statistics that count up when visible
- Add a 'How it works' section with 4 steps for investors and entrepreneurs
- Improve hero section with video background effect or more dynamic particles
- Add footer with contact info, social links, and legal links

2. **Map page enhancements:**
- Add marker clustering when zoomed out using leaflet.markercluster (or implement basic clustering logic)
- Add more investment projects (at least 15 total across UK) with varied categories
- Add a floating mini-legend showing what each color represents
- Add zoom controls styled to match the theme
- Make popup cards more detailed with progress bars, team info, and investment timeline
- Add animated pulsing effect on markers
- Implement working filter functionality if not already working

3. **Global improvements:**
- Add smooth page transitions between home and map
- Ensure all buttons and links work correctly
- Add loading states and skeleton screens
- Improve mobile responsiveness especially for the map sidebar

All text should remain in Russian.

Final polish for a truly impressive investment platform:

1. **Add a 'Featured Projects' carousel on homepage** showing top 4-5 investment opportunities with horizontal scrolling, project cards showing image placeholder, name, amount, ROI, and 'На карте' button linking to map

2. **Add NOVA AI assistant interaction on map page:**
- When clicking the floating NOVA button, show a chat-like modal/drawer
- Include pre-defined quick action buttons: 'Показать все tech-стартапы', 'Найти проекты с ROI >15%', 'Проекты до £500K'
- When clicked, these buttons should filter the map accordingly
- Add a voice input button icon (just visual, no actual voice)

3. **Add project detail modal when clicking 'Подробнее' on map popup:**
- Full-screen or large modal with all project details
- Photo gallery placeholder area
- Detailed description
- Team section with placeholder avatars
- Financial highlights (investment required, current funding, valuation)
- Documents section (pitch deck, business plan - as placeholder links)
- 'Связаться' and 'Инвестировать' CTA buttons
- Video presentation placeholder area

4. **Visual enhancements:**
- Add gradient borders on hover for cards
- Add micro-interactions (scale, glow) on buttons
- Ensure color scheme is consistent everywhere

All text must be in Russian.

Add 25+ new investment projects across EU countries based on real European tech ecosystem data. Update the map with diverse projects:

**GERMANY:**
1. Enpal Berlin - €810M - Renewable Energy - Solar panels, energy storage, heat pumps - coordinates: 52.52, 13.405
2. Helsing Munich - €600M - Defense AI - AI-driven defense software - coordinates: 48.1351, 11.582
3. IONITY Munich - €600M - EV Infrastructure - Ultra-fast EV charging network - coordinates: 48.15, 11.55
4. Finn Munich - €1B - Mobility/FinTech - Car subscription service - coordinates: 48.14, 11.60
5. Bees & Bears Hamburg - €505M - Climate FinTech - Embedded finance for renewables - coordinates: 53.5511, 9.9937

**FRANCE:**
6. Mistral AI Paris - €1.7B - AI/LLM - Generative AI models - coordinates: 48.8566, 2.3522
7. Ubisoft Paris - €1.16B - Gaming - Video games publisher - coordinates: 48.87, 2.33
8. Brevo Paris - €500M - MarTech/CRM - Customer communication platform - coordinates: 48.85, 2.36

**NETHERLANDS:**
9. NXP Semiconductors Eindhoven - €1B - Semiconductors - Microcontrollers, processors - coordinates: 51.4416, 5.4697
10. Nebius Amsterdam - $1B - AI Cloud - GPU cloud infrastructure - coordinates: 52.3676, 4.9041
11. Your.World Amsterdam - €800M - Digital Services - Web & cloud platform - coordinates: 52.38, 4.88

**UK (additional):**
12. CityFibre London - £2.3B - Infrastructure - Full-fibre broadband - coordinates: 51.52, -0.08
13. Nscale London - $1.53B - AI Infrastructure - GPU data centers - coordinates: 51.50, -0.11
14. Isomorphic Labs London - $600M - BioTech/AI - AI drug discovery - coordinates: 51.53, -0.12
15. Capital on Tap London - £500M - FinTech - Business credit cards - coordinates: 51.51, -0.10
16. Ferovinum London - £400M - FinTech - Wine & spirits financing - coordinates: 51.49, -0.07

**SWEDEN:**
17. EcoDataCenter Stockholm - €1.05B - Data Centers - Sustainable AI/cloud data centers - coordinates: 59.3293, 18.0686
18. Elvy Stockholm - €500M - CleanTech - Energy management solutions - coordinates: 59.34, 18.05
19. Lovable Stockholm - €470M - AI/NoCode - AI-powered app builder - coordinates: 59.32, 18.08

**FINLAND:**
20. Nokia Espoo - $1B - Telecom - Network infrastructure - coordinates: 60.205, 24.656
21. Oura Oulu - $900M - HealthTech - Smart wearable ring - coordinates: 65.0121, 25.4651

**ITALY:**
22. Bending Spoons Milan - €1.1B - Software - Consumer software products - coordinates: 45.4642, 9.19

**SPAIN:**
23. Wallbox Barcelona - €350M - EV/CleanTech - EV charging solutions - coordinates: 41.3874, 2.1686
24. Glovo Barcelona - €450M - Delivery/Tech - On-demand delivery platform - coordinates: 41.40, 2.17

**UKRAINE:**
25. Grammarly Kyiv - $1B - AI/Productivity - AI writing assistant - coordinates: 50.4501, 30.5234

**POLAND:**
26. DocPlanner Warsaw - €300M - HealthTech - Medical booking platform - coordinates: 52.2297, 21.0122

**IRELAND:**
27. Stripe Dublin - €500M - FinTech - Payment infrastructure - coordinates: 53.3498, -6.2603

**Update the map to:**
- Include all these new EU projects with proper coordinates
- Add new categories: 'ai' (cyan), 'defense' (slate), 'mobility' (amber), 'infrastructure' (indigo), 'gaming' (pink), 'fintech' (emerald)
- Update category config with new colors and labels in Russian
- Center map on Europe (lat: 50, lng: 10) with zoom level 4
- Add country flags or country name badges on markers
- Update filters to include new categories
- Show total investment volume in header (€15B+)

**Add 'Data Sources' section:**
- Add a small info panel showing connected data sources: 'Dealroom.co', 'Crunchbase', 'PitchBook', 'Tech.eu' with connection status indicators (green dots)
- This simulates real database connections

Keep all existing UK projects and merge with new ones. All UI text in Russian.

Replace the animated globe/particles background in the hero section with the video background. Use the video file at /hero-video.mp4 as a fullscreen background video.

**Implementation:**
1. In the hero section, add a video element as background:
```jsx
<video 
  autoPlay 
  muted 
  loop 
  playsInline
  className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover z-0"
>
  <source src="/hero-video.mp4" type="video/mp4" />
</video>
```

2. Add a dark overlay on top of the video for better text readability:
```jsx
<div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/60 via-black/40 to-[#0a0a1a] z-[1]" />
```

3. Keep all existing hero content (headline, subtitle, buttons, metrics) but place them above the video with z-index

4. Remove or hide the old animated ParticleBackground/globe component in favor of the real video

5. Make sure the video covers the full hero section height (min-h-screen)

6. Add a subtle parallax or scale effect on scroll if possible

7. Video should loop seamlessly

The hero section should now have:
- Full-screen video background playing automatically and looping
- Dark gradient overlay for text contrast
- All existing text content visible on top
- Smooth professional look

Clean up the hero section:

1. **Remove the animated globe/sphere completely** - Delete the AnimatedGlobe component and all its related CSS animations (globe, orbit, particles, grid lines, satellites, etc.)

2. **Center all hero text content** - Move all text to the center of the page:
   - Main headline 'GLOBAL INVESTMENT MAP' - centered
   - Subtitle 'Первая в мире визуальная инвестиционная экосистема' - centered
   - Description text - centered
   - CTA buttons - centered (flex row, justify-center)
   - The three value proposition cards (Ищу инвестиции, Ищу проекты, Деловое сотрудничество) - centered below the buttons

3. **Layout should be:**
   - Full width container
   - All content in a single centered column (items-center, text-center)
   - Remove any grid layouts that split content left/right
   - Proper vertical spacing between elements

4. **Keep the video background and overlay intact**

5. **Remove unused CSS for the globe animations** from index.css if any

The hero should now be clean with just the video background and centered text content.
